cards.title: User research for new dashboard
cards.description: Conduct interviews with 5 key users to understand their workflow needs and pain points.

cards.title: Evaluate database migration options
cards.description: Compare PostgreSQL vs MySQL for the new microservice architecture.

cards.title: Write API documentation
cards.description: Document all REST endpoints for the v2 API using OpenAPI spec.

cards.title: Design login page mockup
cards.description: Create high-fidelity mockups for the new SSO login flow.

cards.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
cards.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment to staging.

cards.title: Implement search feature
cards.description: Full-text search with filters for the main content area.

cards.title: Implement user authentication
cards.description: OAuth2 + JWT token-based auth with refresh token rotation.

cards.title: Create REST API endpoints
cards.description: CRUD endpoints for the project resource with pagination and sorting.

cards.title: Fix navigation bug on mobile
cards.description: Hamburger menu not closing after link click on iOS Safari.

cards.title: Set up project repository
cards.description: Initialize monorepo with Turborepo, configure linting and formatting.

cards.title: Define database schema
cards.description: ER diagram and migration scripts for core tables.

cards.title: Create wireframes
cards.description: Low-fidelity wireframes for all major screens approved by stakeholders.
